body: Amara, just circling back on our conversation from last week — I wanted to share a few more thoughts on the [Verdant Grid](companies/verdant-grid) opportunity before you finalize your diligence timeline. I've been in this space long enough to know that grid-edge orchestration companies either find their wedge in the first 18 months or they don't, and from what I've seen of their pilot data, these folks have something real. Given your focus at [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) on exactly this intersection of climate infrastructure and intelligent systems, I think it could be a strong fit for a seed extension or early Series A conversation. I'd love to get on a call this week if you have 30 minutes — happy to share the technical memo I put together after my site visit in December. Let me know what works.
